info.name: Elameed Education API (v1)
info.description:
# Elameed Education API — v1

Multi-tenant teaching-platform API (Laravel). Generated from `routes/api.php`.

## Quick start
1. Select this collection's variables (or import the matching **Environment**).
2. Set `{{tenant}}` to a tenant slug — dev resolves the tenant from the `X-Tenant` header (non-production only). In prod the tenant comes from the host `<slug>.elameed.app`, so set `{{base_url}}` accordingly and the header is ignored.
3. Run **04 · Auth → Login** (or **Verify OTP**). The token is auto-saved into `{{token}}`; all authenticated requests inherit it as a Bearer token.
4. Fill in id/uuid path variables (e.g. `{{course_uuid}}`) as you go.

## Conventions
- Success envelope: `{ "data": ... }`. Error envelope: `{ "error": { "code", "message", "details" } }`.
- `{{token}}` = student/teacher/parent token; `{{admin_token}}` = platform-admin token (folder 01, no tenant).
- Request bodies are realistic examples derived from the FormRequest validation rules — trim optional fields as needed.

item.name: 00 · Platform (host-level: webhooks & media tokens)

request.description: Gateway-defined, HMAC-verified server-side. Tenant is resolved from the referenced order, not the Host header. Throttled 120/min.
Token-authenticated AES-128 key release for encrypted HLS. Re-checks access before releasing the key.
Token carried in the URL because a <video>/hls.js request cannot send headers.
AES-128 encrypted .ts segment. Segment name must match seg_[0-9]+\.ts.
Internal media-tier endpoint (edge/authz check).
Called by the transcode worker. Requires the X-Transcode-Secret header to match config(media.transcode_secret). status in ready|failed.

Local-dev upload receiver. The signature query params from the startUpload `upload_url` are the auth (add `?expires=...&signature=...`). Accepts multipart `file` or the raw body. Also matches PUT. Prod uses a real object-storage presigned target instead.

item.description: Not tenant-scoped and not bearer-authenticated. Payment webhooks, token-gated encrypted-HLS delivery, and internal media-tier callbacks. Auth is the URL token / request signature / shared secret, not a user session.

item.name: 01 · Platform Admin (cross-tenant)

request.description: slug matches ^[a-z0-9-]+$ and is unique. status in active|suspended|under_review|expired. owner object optional.

item.description: Requires a platform-admin bearer token ({{admin_token}}). NOT tenant-scoped — no X-Tenant header.

item.name: 02 · Tenant Context & Landing

request.description: Optional auth: send a bearer token to get the `enrolled` view.

item.description: Public, tenant-scoped. Resolve branding/context and the public landing page for the current tenant ({{tenant}}).

item.name: 03 · Public Catalog
item.description: Public, tenant-scoped. Published courses of the current tenant.

item.name: 04 · Auth & Identity

request.description: Returns requires_otp=true; then call OTP verify. Throttled.
purpose in register|login|reset.
purpose in register|login. On success, saves data.token to {{token}}.

exec: console.log('OTP required — verify the code, then this saves the token.');

request.description: May return otp_required=true instead of a token. On success, saves data.token to {{token}}.

exec: console.log('OTP required — verify the code, then this saves the token.');

request.description: Revokes the current access token (bearer required).

item.description: OTP/password auth (M11), tenant-scoped. verify/login responses include data.token — the Tests script here auto-saves it into the {{token}} collection variable.

item.name: 05 · Account & Learning

request.description: rating 1-5 required; comment nullable (max 2000).
items 1-50; each type in course|wallet_topup. Prices resolved server-side.
method in wallet|paymob. Throttled.
Body optional. Issues a short-lived playback token (manifest_url + key_url).
watch_percent 0-100 required.
No body.
No body. Returns questions without the answer key.
answers keyed by question_id; value shape varies by type.

item.description: Authenticated student surface (bearer + active membership). Wallet, checkout, playback, progress, favorites, gamification, notifications, exams.

item.name: 06 · Parent Portal
item.description: Requires the parent role in the current tenant (bearer). Read-only views of the linked children.

item.name: 07 · Teacher
item.description: Requires the teacher role in the current tenant (bearer). Full authoring + management surface.

request.description: sections max 30; type in hero|stats|features|about|steps|courses|testimonials|packages|cta|contact. Dynamic types (courses/testimonials) need a config object.
multipart/form-data. file: image (jpeg/png/webp/gif/svg), max 5 MB. Returns a public URL.
title required. arrays max 30; parts max 50. visibility in visible|hidden|scheduled.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Complete Physics - Grade 12",
  "subtitle": "Mechanics to Modern Physics",
  "description": "Full year coverage with solved problems.",
  "learning_outcomes": [
    "Solve kinematics problems",
    "Understand electromagnetism"
  ],
  "requirements": [
    "Basic algebra"
  ],
  "audience": [
    "Grade 12 science students"
  ],
  "parts": [
    {
      "title": "Mechanics",
      "lessons_count": 12,
      "duration_min": 480
    }
  ],
  "category_id": 1,
  "price_minor": 50000,
  "currency": "EGP",
  "access_days": 365,
  "visibility": "visible",
  "publish_at": "2026-08-01T09:00:00Z",
  "is_free": false,
  "purchase_enabled": true,
  "is_center": false,
  "cover_url": "https://cdn.example.com/course-cover.jpg",
  "promo_video_url": "https://youtube.com/watch?v=abc123",
  "points": 100
}

request.description: title stays required on update.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Lesson 1: Displacement & Velocity",
  "description": "Intro to motion concepts.",
  "sort_order": 1,
  "duration_sec": 1800,
  "max_views": 5,
  "is_free_preview": true,
  "visibility": "visible",
  "publish_at": "2026-08-02T09:00:00Z"
}

request.description: multipart. type in pdf|file|link. For type=link send `url` instead of `file`. file max 20 MB.
Async (JSON): filename required_without file -> returns a signed upload_url. Direct: send multipart `file` (video, up to ~1 GB) instead.
No body. Marks the asset ready and links it to its lesson.
No body. Returns { manifest_url, key_url, token, expires_at }.
type in exam|assignment. ends_at after_or_equal starts_at.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Midterm Exam - Mechanics",
  "lesson_id": null,
  "type": "exam",
  "pass_percent": 60,
  "duration_min": 90,
  "attempts_allowed": 2,
  "question_order": "fixed",
  "scoring": "best",
  "starts_at": "2026-09-01T09:00:00Z",
  "ends_at": "2026-09-01T12:00:00Z",
  "result_visibility": "immediate",
  "show_answers": true,
  "depends_on_exam_id": null,
  "mode": "standard",
  "is_published": true
}

request.description: type in mcq|true_false|short|essay|file. mcq needs options+correct.
grades: map of question_id -> awarded points (manual grading).
hide_ranking required boolean.
events 1-500; each needs kind (attendance|redeem) + external_ref (idempotency key).
students: 1-500 student uuids.
type in wallet|course. count 1-1000.
No body.
name+phone required. password optional (a temp one is generated + returned once if omitted).
All fields optional (sometimes). status in active|suspended.
password optional; if omitted, a temp one is generated + returned once and sessions are revoked.
direction in credit|debit.
Posts the difference vs current balance.
message required (max 1000).
name+phone required. relation in father|mother|guardian.

variable.description: API root incl. /api prefix. Prod: https://<slug>.elameed.app/api
X-Tenant slug (dev header override; non-production only)
MediaAsset uuid for the signed dev upload receiver
